proof_chip_line:
stores run WooCommerce POS
on WordPress.org since May 2014
review_cta_line: Running your shop on the free register? A review helps other store owners find it.
roadmap_listen: Pro users shape the priorities. There's no ticket queue — you tell me what your shop needs on Discord, and it shapes this list.
fair_licence: If you stop paying, Pro keeps working. Updates and support stop.
pro_active_thanks: You're on Pro — thank you for keeping this project going.
